title: IP26 4RJ, Wayland Farms Limited: environmental permit refused - EPR/XP3632QE/V003
body: "The decision taken by the Environment Agency to refuse a permit application for an installation in Thetford, Norfolk.  This decision includes the refusal notice and decision document for:   Operator name: Wayland Farms Limited Installation name: Methwold Farm Pig Unit (Comprising Airfield Farm, Feltwell Farm and Methwold Farm) Permit number: EPR/XP3632QE/V003  "
